instructions.en: Make the root route reply with the plain-text greeting "Hello, Express!" when visited.
instructions.pt: Faça a rota raiz responder com a saudação em texto simples "Hello, Express!" quando acessada.
instructions.es: Haz que la ruta raíz responda con el saludo en texto plano "Hello, Express!" al visitarla.
instructions.de: Lass die Root-Route bei einem Besuch mit der Klartext-Begrüßung "Hello, Express!" antworten.
instructions.it: Fai in modo che la rotta principale risponda con il saluto in testo semplice "Hello, Express!" quando viene visitata.
instructions.fr: Faites en sorte que la route racine réponde avec le message en texte brut "Hello, Express!" lorsqu'elle est visitée.

tests: const app = createApp(); const server = app.listen(3030); const res = await fetch('http://localhost:3030/'); const text = await res.text(); await new Promise((r) => server.close(r)); expect(text).toBe('Hello, Express!');
const app2 = createApp(); const server2 = app2.listen(3031); const res2 = await fetch('http://localhost:3031/'); await new Promise((r) => server2.close(r)); expect(res2.status).toBe(200);
